TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Nsgan_Ru-yey, title = Nsgan_Ru-yey, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nsgan_Ru-yey} }

S.FORM: nsgan Ru-yey(kari sbnawan: Shikano, kari klmukan: LoŐćk-i√°-hiong, kari Ngay-ngay hnang 4 nyusan Tay-wang : Luk Iaňä Hiongňä. Kari Ngay-ngay mslxan: LuŐćk-y√Ę-hi√īng)ga mniq tgska nyusan Tay-tung Tay-wang, quri baraw o msgasig nsgan Kwan-san, mgbaraw ryaxan hidaw o msgasig nsgan Haytwan, quri nklaan hidaw o msgasig nsgan Tung-hu, quri ryaxan hidaw ni hunat o plutut nsgan Yeyn-ping. Pnteayus qmpahan euda qmpah Sayang nsgan Ru-yey o niqan 8000 hmbragan hiyi, seejiq klmukan 40ÔľÖ, seejiq ngayngay 30ÔľÖ, seejiq tnpusu mkbrnux o 20ÔľÖ, Duma do 10ÔľÖ. Lala klgan seejiq ni niqan nanak knkla kndsan dha. Nsgan Ru-yey spuan na kmlawa ka alang o saw nii, Ru-yey, Lung-teyn, Yung-an, Jwey-rung,Jwey-yeyn,Jwey-hu, Jwey-hung, niqan empitu alang, qmpah quri dxgal o tg10 o niqan 7. Qmpah dxgal ka pusu qpahun dha. alang Lung-teyn, Jwey-hung, Yung-an, Jwey-hu, Jwey-lung, Ru-yey, Jwey-yeyn. Endaan Ru-yey o knxalan Cying siida klwaan nsgan Kwang-san. klwaan Ni-hung siida do wada pryuxan nsgan Kwan-san alang Ru-yey ksun. bukuy mnkeekan do pryuxun ni phyugun "nsgan Ru-yey". Kiya ni balay ni nLey-kung-hu ka Sang-yey, Cung-yey, Syia-yey do wada spuun alang Rwan-san syusi ni msupu nsgan Yeyn-ping. Niqan dha ka pnyahan kari Hangan dxgal Ru-yey, kingal o msa, dxgal hini sbiyaw o taadus bbuyu, msuwil niqan qpuring rqnux miyah rmdu msangay hini. Kika ksun"Ru-yey". Kingal kari duri o, klwaan Ni-hung siida, seejiq Ni-hung o phiyug kingal alang hini yahun dha mniq seejiq tmbarah, kika psli seejiq nyusan Sin-sey dmqpah dxgal miyah tbarah hini, kika seejiq Ni-hung do hangan dxgal ruliaw siida o pryuxun Ru-yey ksun. bukuy mnkeekan do phiyug nsgan siida do asi angal hangan nsgan. Paah alang paru Tay-tung muda elug Tay-wang 9 spgan mquri tgbaraw, muda dgril Cu-ru ayug rklu, muda duri ayug Ru-yey, qtaan o saw kingal paru bi tadus breenux. Hini o Ching siida bukung Tay-tung Hu-cwan o saw kari na"tgparu bi tadus breenux Tay-tung"msa. knxalan sayang do hini o kika ksun pusu phpah qlupas -"Ru-yey"ksun, Ru-yey o mnda yahan ttmalang qpuring rqnux. Qrunang mangal tunux seejiq mkdiyaq. Seejiq Ni-hung o lnlungan dha hini o malu balay nniqan. Duri ni seejiq pnaah ryahan hidaw Tay-wang o kuxul dha balay miyah tg2 tbarah mniq. Sayang do seejiq qnpah qpahun klwaan ni mtgsa o kuxul dha balay gmaaw miyah tpusu mniq. Duri ni kska klwaan Tay-wang o paru balay nsgan yahan rmigaw qmita ni msangay. Hmbragan seejiq 2021/2 7,579 Elug hqulan Ru-yey o ga mniq breenux gbiyuk Hwa-Tung pusu elug o niqan elug qrngul Tay-tung ni elug Tay-wang tg9 spgan o muda tglihug ska hini. Elug tdruy qrngul Sapah kmlawa tdruy qrngul Tay-wang(‚ÄĘ Elug Tay-tung:rdaan Jwey-hu -rdaan Jwey-yeyn -rdaan Ru-yey) Tdruy bahu,tdruy ppaan seejiq ‚ÄĘ Ting-tung tdruy ppaan seejiq Ôľītgsa ptasan tgska ‚ÄĘ ptasan tgska Ru-yey nyusan Tay-tung(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ ptasan tgska Jwi-yeyn nyusan Tay-tung(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ptasan tgbilaq ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Ru-yey nsgan Ru-yey ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Yung-an nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Yung-an ptasan sbiq Yung-rung nsgan Ru-yey nyusan Tay-tung(wada laxan) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Jweyyen nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Jwey-hung nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Lung-ten nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) Ôľ≥aan rmigaw qmita ‚ÄĘ Elug knhuway tqiri nsgan Ruyey qtaan mneudus ‚ÄĘ Elug bling mpajiq Wu-ring ‚ÄĘ Dxgal qcilus Sin-liang ‚ÄĘ 2 tntunan hakaw Ping-suey ‚ÄĘ Tgbaraw tatat Ryey Prajing 2011 hnkawas qulung rbagan do nsgan Ru-yey muda euda "Tay-wang kklwaan skiya mtalux paru qurug gowmu cya-neyn-hwa." Ôľęnmalu nhuma ‚ÄĘ qsiya rbnaw Hu-rung ‚ÄĘ Embanah Wulung qsiya rbnaw ‚ÄĘ sibus embanah ‚ÄĘ Karat ‚ÄĘ Howlung kow ‚ÄĘ Gitu ‚ÄĘ Blbul ‚ÄĘ bkiluh ‚ÄĘ Karat bkiluh ((Snakun:Truku))
S.PHON: nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(ka…ĺi sbnawan: sńßikano, ka…ĺi klmukan: lo*k-i*-ńßioŇč, ka…ĺi Ňčaj-Ňčaj ńßnaŇč * njusan taj-waŇč : luk ia* ńßioŇč*. ka…ĺi Ňčaj-Ňčaj mslxan: lu*k-j*-ńßi*Ňč)ga mniq tgska njusan taj-tuŇč taj-waŇč, qu…ĺi ba…ĺaw o msgasig nsgan kwan-san, mgba…ĺaw …ĺjaxan ńßidaw o msgasig nsgan ńßajtwan, qu…ĺi nklaan ńßidaw o msgasig nsgan tuŇč-ńßu, qu…ĺi …ĺjaxan ńßidaw ni ńßunat o plutut nsgan j…ôn-piŇč. pnt…ôajus qmpańßan …ôuda qmpańß sajaŇč nsgan …ĺu-j…ô o niqan **** ńßmb…ĺagan ńßiji, s…ô…ô…üiq klmukan ***, s…ô…ô…üiq ŇčajŇčaj ***, s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu mkb…ĺnux o ***, duma do ***. lala klgan s…ô…ô…üiq ni niqan nanak knkla kndsan dńßa. nsgan …ĺu-j…ô spuan na kmlawa ka alaŇč o saw nii, …ĺu-j…ô, luŇč-t…ôn, juŇč-an, …üw…ô-…ĺuŇč,…üw…ô-j…ôn,…üw…ô-ńßu, …üw…ô-ńßuŇč, niqan …ômpitu alaŇč, qmpańß qu…ĺi dxgal o tg** o niqan *. qmpańß dxgal ka pusu qpańßun dńßa. alaŇč luŇč-t…ôn, …üw…ô-ńßuŇč, juŇč-an, …üw…ô-ńßu, …üw…ô-luŇč, …ĺu-j…ô, …üw…ô-j…ôn. …ôndaan …ĺu-j…ô o knxalan ¶jiŇč siida klwaan nsgan kwaŇč-san. klwaan ni-ńßuŇč siida do wada p…ĺjuxan nsgan kwan-san alaŇč …ĺu-j…ô ksun. bukuj mnk…ô…ôkan do p…ĺjuxun ni pńßjugun "nsgan …ĺu-j…ô". kija ni balaj ni nl…ô-kuŇč-ńßu ka saŇč-j…ô, ¶uŇč-j…ô, sjia-j…ô do wada spuun alaŇč …ĺwan-san sjusi ni msupu nsgan j…ôn-piŇč. niqan dńßa ka pnjańßan ka…ĺi ńßaŇčan dxgal …ĺu-j…ô, kiŇčal o msa, dxgal ńßini sbijaw o taadus bbuju, msuwil niqan qpu…ĺiŇč …ĺqnux mijańß …ĺmdu msaŇčaj ńßini. kika ksun"…ĺu-j…ô". kiŇčal ka…ĺi du…ĺi o, klwaan ni-ńßuŇč siida, s…ô…ô…üiq ni-ńßuŇč o pńßijug kiŇčal alaŇč ńßini jańßun dńßa mniq s…ô…ô…üiq tmba…ĺańß, kika psli s…ô…ô…üiq njusan sin-s…ô dmqpańß dxgal mijańß tba…ĺańß ńßini, kika s…ô…ô…üiq ni-ńßuŇč do ńßaŇčan dxgal …ĺuliaw siida o p…ĺjuxun …ĺu-j…ô ksun. bukuj mnk…ô…ôkan do pńßijug nsgan siida do asi aŇčal ńßaŇčan nsgan. paańß alaŇč pa…ĺu taj-tuŇč muda …ôlug taj-waŇč * spgan mqu…ĺi tgba…ĺaw, muda dg…ĺil ¶u-…ĺu ajug …ĺklu, muda du…ĺi ajug …ĺu-j…ô, qtaan o saw kiŇčal pa…ĺu bi tadus b…ĺ…ô…ônux. ńßini o ¶ńßiŇč siida bukuŇč taj-tuŇč ńßu- ¶wan o saw ka…ĺi na"tgpa…ĺu bi tadus b…ĺ…ô…ônux taj-tuŇč"msa. knxalan sajaŇč do ńßini o kika ksun pusu pńßpańß qlupas -"…ĺu-j…ô"ksun, …ĺu-j…ô o mnda jańßan ttmalaŇč qpu…ĺiŇč …ĺqnux. q…ĺunaŇč maŇčal tunux s…ô…ô…üiq mkdijaq. s…ô…ô…üiq ni-ńßuŇč o lnluŇčan dńßa ńßini o malu balaj nniqan. du…ĺi ni s…ô…ô…üiq pnaańß …ĺjańßan ńßidaw taj-waŇč o kuxul dńßa balaj mijańß tg* tba…ĺańß mniq. sajaŇč do s…ô…ô…üiq qnpańß qpańßun klwaan ni mtgsa o kuxul dńßa balaj gmaaw mijańß tpusu mniq. du…ĺi ni kska klwaan taj-waŇč o pa…ĺu balaj nsgan jańßan …ĺmigaw qmita ni msaŇčaj. ńßmb…ĺagan s…ô…ô…üiq ****/* *,*** …ôlug ńßqulan …ĺu-j…ô o ga mniq b…ĺ…ô…ônux gbijuk ńßwa-tuŇč pusu …ôlug o niqan …ôlug q…ĺŇčul taj-tuŇč ni …ôlug taj-waŇč tg* spgan o muda tglińßug ska ńßini. …ôlug td…ĺuj q…ĺŇčul sapańß kmlawa td…ĺuj q…ĺŇčul taj-waŇč(* …ôlug taj-tuŇč:…ĺdaan …üw…ô-ńßu -…ĺdaan …üw…ô-j…ôn -…ĺdaan …ĺu-j…ô) td…ĺuj bańßu,td…ĺuj ppaan s…ô…ô…üiq * tiŇč-tuŇč td…ĺuj ppaan s…ô…ô…üiq *tgsa ptasan tgska * ptasan tgska …ĺu-j…ô njusan taj-tuŇč(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgska …üwi-j…ôn njusan taj-tuŇč(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) ptasan tgbilaq * ptasan tgbilaq …ĺu-j…ô nsgan …ĺu-j…ô * ptasan tgbilaq juŇč-an nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgbilaq juŇč-an ptasan sbiq juŇč-…ĺuŇč nsgan …ĺu-j…ô njusan taj-tuŇč(wada laxan) * ptasan tgbilaq …üw…ôj…ôn nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgbilaq …üw…ô-ńßuŇč nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgbilaq luŇč-t…ôn nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) *aan …ĺmigaw qmita * …ôlug knńßuwaj tqi…ĺi nsgan …ĺuj…ô qtaan mn…ôudus * …ôlug bliŇč mpa…üiq wu-…ĺiŇč * dxgal q ¶ilus sin-liaŇč * * tntunan ńßakaw piŇč-su…ô * tgba…ĺaw tatat …ĺj…ô p…ĺa…üiŇč **** ńßnkawas quluŇč …ĺbagan do nsgan …ĺu-j…ô muda …ôuda "taj-waŇč kklwaan skija mtalux pa…ĺu qu…ĺug gowmu ¶ja-n…ôn-ńßwa." *nmalu nńßuma * qsija …ĺbnaw ńßu-…ĺuŇč * …ômbanańß wuluŇč qsija …ĺbnaw * sibus …ômbanańß * ka…ĺat * ńßowluŇč kow * gitu * blbul * bkiluńß * ka…ĺat bkiluńß ((snakun:t…ĺuku))
S.FORM: nsgan Ru-yey(kari sbnawan: Shikano, kari klmukan: LoŐćk-i√°-hiong, kari Ngay-ngay hnang 4 nyusan Tay-wang : Luk Iaňä Hiongňä. Kari Ngay-ngay mslxan: LuŐćk-y√Ę-hi√īng)ga mniq tgska nyusan Tay-tung Tay-wang, quri baraw o msgasig nsgan Kwan-san, mgbaraw ryaxan hidaw o msgasig nsgan Haytwan, quri nklaan hidaw o msgasig nsgan Tung-hu, quri ryaxan hidaw ni hunat o plutut nsgan Yeyn-ping. Pnteayus qmpahan euda qmpah Sayang nsgan Ru-yey o niqan 8000 hmbragan hiyi, seejiq klmukan 40ÔľÖ, seejiq ngayngay 30ÔľÖ, seejiq tnpusu mkbrnux o 20ÔľÖ, Duma do 10ÔľÖ. Lala klgan seejiq ni niqan nanak knkla kndsan dha. Nsgan Ru-yey spuan na kmlawa ka alang o saw nii, Ru-yey, Lung-teyn, Yung-an, Jwey-rung,Jwey-yeyn,Jwey-hu, Jwey-hung, niqan empitu alang, qmpah quri dxgal o tg10 o niqan 7. Qmpah dxgal ka pusu qpahun dha. alang Lung-teyn, Jwey-hung, Yung-an, Jwey-hu, Jwey-lung, Ru-yey, Jwey-yeyn. Endaan Ru-yey o knxalan Cying siida klwaan nsgan Kwang-san. klwaan Ni-hung siida do wada pryuxan nsgan Kwan-san alang Ru-yey ksun. bukuy mnkeekan do pryuxun ni phyugun "nsgan Ru-yey". Kiya ni balay ni nLey-kung-hu ka Sang-yey, Cung-yey, Syia-yey do wada spuun alang Rwan-san syusi ni msupu nsgan Yeyn-ping. Niqan dha ka pnyahan kari Hangan dxgal Ru-yey, kingal o msa, dxgal hini sbiyaw o taadus bbuyu, msuwil niqan qpuring rqnux miyah rmdu msangay hini. Kika ksun"Ru-yey". Kingal kari duri o, klwaan Ni-hung siida, seejiq Ni-hung o phiyug kingal alang hini yahun dha mniq seejiq tmbarah, kika psli seejiq nyusan Sin-sey dmqpah dxgal miyah tbarah hini, kika seejiq Ni-hung do hangan dxgal ruliaw siida o pryuxun Ru-yey ksun. bukuy mnkeekan do phiyug nsgan siida do asi angal hangan nsgan. Paah alang paru Tay-tung muda elug Tay-wang 9 spgan mquri tgbaraw, muda dgril Cu-ru ayug rklu, muda duri ayug Ru-yey, qtaan o saw kingal paru bi tadus breenux. Hini o Ching siida bukung Tay-tung Hu-cwan o saw kari na"tgparu bi tadus breenux Tay-tung"msa. knxalan sayang do hini o kika ksun pusu phpah qlupas -"Ru-yey"ksun, Ru-yey o mnda yahan ttmalang qpuring rqnux. Qrunang mangal tunux seejiq mkdiyaq. Seejiq Ni-hung o lnlungan dha hini o malu balay nniqan. Duri ni seejiq pnaah ryahan hidaw Tay-wang o kuxul dha balay miyah tg2 tbarah mniq. Sayang do seejiq qnpah qpahun klwaan ni mtgsa o kuxul dha balay gmaaw miyah tpusu mniq. Duri ni kska klwaan Tay-wang o paru balay nsgan yahan rmigaw qmita ni msangay. Hmbragan seejiq 2021/2 7,579 Elug hqulan Ru-yey o ga mniq breenux gbiyuk Hwa-Tung pusu elug o niqan elug qrngul Tay-tung ni elug Tay-wang tg9 spgan o muda tglihug ska hini. Elug tdruy qrngul Sapah kmlawa tdruy qrngul Tay-wang(‚ÄĘ Elug Tay-tung:rdaan Jwey-hu -rdaan Jwey-yeyn -rdaan Ru-yey) Tdruy bahu,tdruy ppaan seejiq ‚ÄĘ Ting-tung tdruy ppaan seejiq Ôľītgsa ptasan tgska ‚ÄĘ ptasan tgska Ru-yey nyusan Tay-tung(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ ptasan tgska Jwi-yeyn nyusan Tay-tung(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ptasan tgbilaq ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Ru-yey nsgan Ru-yey ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Yung-an nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Yung-an ptasan sbiq Yung-rung nsgan Ru-yey nyusan Tay-tung(wada laxan) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Jweyyen nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Jwey-hung nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) ‚ÄĘ Ptasan tgbilaq Lung-ten nsgan Ru-yey(patas spgan ga skuun psraman mangal,ga skuun sapah pnatas elug samaw kaji) Ôľ≥aan rmigaw qmita ‚ÄĘ Elug knhuway tqiri nsgan Ruyey qtaan mneudus ‚ÄĘ Elug bling mpajiq Wu-ring ‚ÄĘ Dxgal qcilus Sin-liang ‚ÄĘ 2 tntunan hakaw Ping-suey ‚ÄĘ Tgbaraw tatat Ryey Prajing 2011 hnkawas qulung rbagan do nsgan Ru-yey muda euda "Tay-wang kklwaan skiya mtalux paru qurug gowmu cya-neyn-hwa." Ôľęnmalu nhuma ‚ÄĘ qsiya rbnaw Hu-rung ‚ÄĘ Embanah Wulung qsiya rbnaw ‚ÄĘ sibus embanah ‚ÄĘ Karat ‚ÄĘ Howlung kow ‚ÄĘ Gitu ‚ÄĘ Blbul ‚ÄĘ bkiluh ‚ÄĘ Karat bkiluh ((Snakun:Truku))

taj-tuŇč taj-waŇč, qu…ĺi ba…ĺaw o msgasig nsgan kwan-san, mgba…ĺaw …ĺjaxan ńßidaw o msgasig nsgan ńßajtwan, qu…ĺi nklaan ńßidaw o msgasig nsgan tuŇč-ńßu, qu…ĺi …ĺjaxan ńßidaw ni ńßunat o plutut nsgan s…ô…ô…üiq ni niqan nanak knkla kndsan dńßa. nsgan …ĺu-j…ô spuan na kmlawa ka alaŇč o saw nii, …ĺu-j…ô, luŇč-t…ôn, juŇč-an, …üw…ô-…ĺuŇč,…üw…ô-j…ôn,…üw…ô-ńßu, …üw…ô-ńßuŇč, niqan …ômpitu alaŇč, qmpańß kwaŇč-san. klwaan ni-ńßuŇč siida do wada p…ĺjuxan nsgan kwan-san alaŇč …ĺu-j…ô ksun. bukuj mnk…ô…ôkan do p…ĺjuxun ni pńßjugun "nsgan …ĺu-j…ô". kija ni balaj ni nl…ô-kuŇč-ńßu ka saŇč-j…ô, ¶uŇč-j…ô, sjia-j…ô do wada spuun alaŇč …ĺwan-san sjusi ni msupu nsgan j…ôn-piŇč. niqan dńßa ka pnjańßan ka…ĺi ńßaŇčan dxgal …ĺu-j…ô, kiŇčal o msa, dxgal ńßini sbijaw o taadus bbuju, msuwil niqan qpu…ĺiŇč …ĺqnux mijańß …ĺmdu msaŇčaj ńßini. kika ksun"…ĺu-j…ô". kiŇčal ka…ĺi du…ĺi o, klwaan ni-ńßuŇč siida, s…ô…ô…üiq ni-ńßuŇč o pńßijug kiŇčal alaŇč ńßini jańßun dńßa mniq s…ô…ô…üiq tmba…ĺańß, kika psli s…ô…ô…üiq njusan sin-s…ô dmqpańß dxgal mijańß tba…ĺańß ńßini, kika s…ô…ô…üiq ni-ńßuŇč do ńßaŇčan dxgal …ĺuliaw siida o p…ĺjuxun …ĺu-j…ô ksun. bukuj mnk…ô…ôkan do pńßijug nsgan siida do asi aŇčal ńßaŇčan nsgan. paańß alaŇč pa…ĺu taj-tuŇč muda …ôlug taj-waŇč * spgan mqu…ĺi tgba…ĺaw, muda dg…ĺil ¶u-…ĺu ajug …ĺklu, muda du…ĺi ajug …ĺu-j…ô, qtaan o saw kiŇčal pa…ĺu bi tadus b…ĺ…ô…ônux. ńßini o ¶ńßiŇč siida bukuŇč taj-tuŇč ńßu- ¶wan o saw ka…ĺi na"tgpa…ĺu bi tadus b…ĺ…ô…ônux taj-tuŇč"msa. knxalan sajaŇč do ńßini o kika ksun pusu pńßpańß qlupas -"…ĺu-j…ô"ksun, …ĺu-j…ô o mnda jańßan ttmalaŇč qpu…ĺiŇč …ĺqnux. q…ĺunaŇč maŇčal tunux s…ô…ô…üiq mkdijaq. s…ô…ô…üiq ni-ńßuŇč o lnluŇčan dńßa ńßini o malu balaj nniqan. du…ĺi ni s…ô…ô…üiq pnaańß …ĺjańßan ńßidaw taj-waŇč o kuxul dńßa balaj mijańß tg* tba…ĺańß mniq. sajaŇč do s…ô…ô…üiq qnpańß qpańßun klwaan ni mtgsa o kuxul dńßa balaj gmaaw mijańß tpusu mniq. du…ĺi ni kska klwaan taj-waŇč o pa…ĺu balaj nsgan jańßan …ĺmigaw qmita ni msaŇčaj. ńßmb…ĺagan s…ô…ô…üiq ****/* *,*** …ôlug ńßqulan …ĺu-j…ô o ga mniq b…ĺ…ô…ônux gbijuk ńßwa-tuŇč pusu …ôlug o niqan …ôlug q…ĺŇčul taj-tuŇč ni …ôlug taj-waŇč tg* spgan o muda tglińßug ska ńßini. …ôlug td…ĺuj q…ĺŇčul sapańß kmlawa td…ĺuj q…ĺŇčul taj-waŇč(* …ôlug taj-tuŇč:…ĺdaan …üw…ô-ńßu -…ĺdaan …üw…ô-j…ôn -…ĺdaan …ĺu-j…ô) td…ĺuj bańßu,td…ĺuj ppaan s…ô…ô…üiq * tiŇč-tuŇč td…ĺuj ppaan s…ô…ô…üiq *tgsa ptasan tgska * ptasan tgska …ĺu-j…ô njusan taj-tuŇč(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgska …üwi-j…ôn njusan taj-tuŇč(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) ptasan tgbilaq * ptasan tgbilaq …ĺu-j…ô nsgan …ĺu-j…ô * ptasan tgbilaq juŇč-an nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgbilaq juŇč-an ptasan sbiq juŇč-…ĺuŇč nsgan …ĺu-j…ô njusan taj-tuŇč(wada laxan) * ptasan tgbilaq …üw…ôj…ôn nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgbilaq …üw…ô-ńßuŇč nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) * ptasan tgbilaq luŇč-t…ôn nsgan …ĺu-j…ô(patas spgan ga skuun ps…ĺaman maŇčal,ga skuun sapańß pnatas …ôlug samaw ka…üi) *aan …ĺmigaw qmita * …ôlug knńßuwaj tqi…ĺi nsgan …ĺuj…ô qtaan mn…ôudus * …ôlug bliŇč mpa…üiq wu-…ĺiŇč * dxgal q ¶ilus sin-liaŇč * * tntunan ńßakaw piŇč-su…ô * tgba…ĺaw tatat …ĺj…ô p…ĺa…üiŇč **** ńßnkawas quluŇč …ĺbagan do nsgan …ĺu-j…ô muda …ôuda "taj-waŇč kklwaan skija mtalux pa…ĺu qu…ĺug gowmu ¶ja-n…ôn-ńßwa." *nmalu nńßuma * qsija …ĺbnaw ńßu-…ĺuŇč * …ômbanańß wuluŇč qsija …ĺbnaw * sibus …ômbanańß * ka…ĺat * ńßowluŇč kow * gitu * blbul * bkiluńß * ka…ĺat bkiluńß ((snakun:t…ĺuku))
